content.speakerText: All set! Have a great trip home!
content.speakerTextCn: 搞定啦！祝您回家旅途愉快！
expectedAnswers: Thanks so much! You've been wonderful.
Thank you so much — I really appreciate it!
Cool, thanks! You guys are awesome!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了真诚感谢
语言准确性：语法正确，无严重错误
表达自然度：符合英语口语习惯，语气得体
关键词覆盖：使用了 'thanks', 'appreciate', 'wonderful/awesome' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Hope to see you again soon!
expectedAnswers: I hope so too — I’ll definitely be back next year!
For sure! Your service was great.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了再次光临的意愿
语言准确性：语法和时态使用正确
表达自然度：语气真诚，符合英语母语者道别习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 'definitely', 'back', 'thanks', 'service' 等关键词

content.speakerText: Thank you for your help today. Safe travels!
content.speakerTextCn: 感谢您今天的帮助，祝您旅途平安！
expectedAnswers: Thank you! I really appreciate your kindness.
Thanks a lot — you’ve made my stay so pleasant!
I’m grateful for everything. Have a great day!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了感谢并表达感激之情
语言准确性：用词得体，无语法错误
表达自然度：语气真诚，符合服务场景的礼貌结尾
关键词覆盖：使用了 'thank', 'appreciate', 'grateful', 'kindness', 'pleasant' 等情感词汇
